creator: michael@goriver.com
text:
Hi 
On your website 
the links
ftp://ftp.<somefile>
do not work
if I change then in the browser
to 
http://ftp.<somefile>
then they work

If i look at the source of you website the are with ftp:// 
so I think its your website.

This files are to download your operating system for installation.
